description: Ensure your child’s comfort and style with these girls' knee-high cotton-rich school socks. Designed for active days at school or casual wear, these socks offer the perfect combination of durability, softness, and breathability. Made from a high-quality cotton blend, they provide a soft and gentle feel against the skin, while their knee-high length ensures coverage and warmth. These socks feature a reinforced toe and heel, making them durable enough to withstand daily wear and tear. The stay-up cuffs ensure the socks remain securely in place throughout the day, preventing slipping or bunching. With a classic plain design, they’re perfect for pairing with school uniforms or any formal outfits. Available in size 4-6 UK, these socks are designed to fit girls comfortably, offering the flexibility needed for growing feet. They’re also easy to care for, being fully machine washable and maintaining their softness and shape after multiple washes. Whether for school, play, or everyday use, these knee-high socks are a must-have wardrobe essential!
